text:
The fifth day of the Paris Olympics 2024 is here and sports enthusiasts are anxiously waiting for the action to start off as 18 gold medals lie in the offering with swimming being one of the most important sport to be covered on this day. Here's how to watch all the live action around Day 5 live from the US.
